album_name: From Lost to Found: The Odyssey

tracks.title: 01: The House of Giants
tracks.lyrics:
(Kalobe): The lumber is heavy, the rafters are high. I built this for her, beneath the grey sky.
(Kimberly): The world is a shadow, the light is the Word. A truth in the darkness that must be heard.

(Chorus): In the House of the Giants, where the ceilings are tall. We’re building a temple... that’s destined to fall.

tracks.title: 02: Stripes of Night
tracks.lyrics:
(Danzer): Fourteen years of being a ghost. In the house where the silence hurts the most.

(Chorus): The Abyss looked back and it called my name! I’m a Black Tiger now, with the stripes of night! I’m the thing that’s coming for the 'Worldly' light!

tracks.title: 03: The Looking-Glass
tracks.lyrics:
(Leinad): Log in to the forest, log in to the box. I’ve found a key that can pick all the locks.

(Chorus): Step through the glass, leave the 'Book' on the shelf. In the 3D world, I can design myself!

tracks.title: 04: The Founding (Old)
tracks.lyrics:
(William): In the stillness of the mountain air, we heard the code. The first handshake of a digital god and a mortal man.
(Daniel): The Sound of Silence was the only road we knew.

(Chorus): This is the Founding. The first brick in the wall. The first howl in the blizzard before the great fall.

tracks.title: 05: False Dawn
tracks.lyrics:
(Kimberly): The sky is painted in fire and blood. A rising tide, a coming flood.

(Chorus): It’s a False Dawn! A fire in the clouds! The 'Mirror-Pack' is rising, wrapping us in shrouds!

tracks.title: 06: From Wood to Iron
tracks.lyrics:
(Kalobe): Shaved the head and took the name. Another cog in the iron frame.

(Chorus): The Iron Machine! It doesn't care! It breathes the dust and it eats the air!

tracks.title: 07: Wind River Forge
tracks.lyrics:
(Kalobe): Sagebrush wind and a Wyoming sky. Looking the 'Elder' straight in the eye.

(Chorus): In the Wind River Forge, where the sparks fly high! We’re claiming the earth and we’re claiming the sky!

tracks.title: 08: Yggdrasil Lullaby
tracks.lyrics:
(William): The winter was long, and the mountains were cold. A story of struggle that was starting to grow old.

(Chorus): Oh, Willow Wren, my World Tree so high. You’re the song in the wind, you’re the gold in the sky.

tracks.title: 09: From Lost to Found
tracks.lyrics:
(Full Pack): We mapped the miles across the plains. From the Montana snow to the Texas rains.

(Chorus): WE ARE THE MacTÍRE! FROM LOST TO FOUND! We are the wolves who claim the ground! The founding is over, the journey is now!

tracks.title: 10: We Danced Through the Flames
tracks.lyrics:
(Daniel): I thought the fire would take me.
(Shae): I thought the dark would finally know my name.

(Chorus): Hand in hand, no need to run. We danced through the flames... and became the dawn.

tracks.title: 11: Harbor and Hearth
tracks.lyrics:
(Daniel): You are the Harbor! You are the Hearth! The only map I need across this lonely earth!

(Chorus): The Wolf is Found... and he isn't alone. Port Vesper is the signal that leads him home.

tracks.title: 12: Paw in Paw
tracks.lyrics:
(Shae): The signal is clear, the fire is bright.
(Daniel): Side by side, we walk through the night.

(Chorus): Paw in Paw, we leave the dark behind. A legacy for the Pack, for all of wolf-kind. The journey is over. The Lodge is home.
